name: arckit-fde
description: ArcKit FDE Site Generator — one command, /arckit-fde:create, that interviews you and generates a brandable, GitHub-Pages-ready Forward Deploy Engineering consulting website (hero, value props, bootstrap-sprint pack, Day 0-5 cadence, pricing tiers, policy alignment, worked examples, CTA, and discovery metadata). White-label: set your own brand, colour, pricing and contact; choose a UK public sector or generic market preset. Claude Code only; outputs a static site to docs/.
